visual.name: FlexiPivot
visual.description: Interactive Pivot Table for Power BI with drag-and-drop functionality

dataRoles.name: Field
dataRoles.description: Fields to use in the pivot table

dataRoles.name: Tooltips
dataRoles.description: Additional fields to show in tooltips

valueFontSize.description: Font size for value cells (in pixels)

rowHeaderFontSize.description: Font size for row headers (in pixels)

columnTotalFontSize.description: Font size for column totals (in pixels)

rowTotalFontSize.description: Font size for row totals (in pixels)

grandTotalFontSize.description: Font size for grand total (in pixels)

rowTotalText.description: Custom text for row totals (default: Totals)

rowTotalLabelFontSize.description: Font size for row total labels (in pixels)

rowTotalLabelFontFamily.description: Font family for row total labels

rowTotalLabelFontColor.description: Text color for row total labels

rowTotalLabelBackgroundColor.description: Background color for row total labels

rowTotalLabelBold.description: Bold text for row total labels

rowTotalLabelItalic.description: Italic text for row total labels

rowTotalLabelUnderline.description: Underline text for row total labels

columnTotalText.description: Custom text for column totals (default: Totals)

columnTotalLabelFontSize.description: Font size for column total labels (in pixels)

columnTotalLabelFontFamily.description: Font family for column total labels

columnTotalLabelFontColor.description: Text color for column total labels

columnTotalLabelBackgroundColor.description: Background color for column total labels

columnTotalLabelBold.description: Bold text for column total labels

columnTotalLabelItalic.description: Italic text for column total labels

columnTotalLabelUnderline.description: Underline text for column total labels

pivotControlsOrientation.description: Layout orientation for pivot controls (Auto adjusts based on available space)

filterBackgroundColor.description: Background color for pivot controls area

controlsWidth.description: Width of the controls column in pixels (Chart Type, Measure, Rows)

fieldChipFontSize.description: Font size for draggable field tags (in pixels)

fieldChipFontFamily.description: Font family for draggable field tags

fieldChipFontColor.description: Text color for draggable field tags

fieldChipBackgroundColor.description: Background color for draggable field tags

filterDropdownFontColor.description: Text color for filter dropdown popup

filterDropdownBackgroundColor.description: Background color for filter dropdown popup

filterDropdownItemBackgroundColor.description: Background color for the values list in filter dropdown

filterDropdownSelectedItemBackgroundColo.description: Background color for selected (checked) values in filter dropdown

filterDropdownBorderColor.description: Border color for filter dropdown popup

filterDropdownItemBackgroundColor.description: Background color for the values list in filter dropdown

filterDropdownSelectedItemBackgroundColo.description: Background color for selected (checked) values in filter dropdown

chartTypeFontSize.description: Font size for chart type selector (in pixels)

chartTypeFontFamily.description: Font family for chart type selector

chartTypeFontColor.description: Text color for chart type selector

chartTypeBackgroundColor.description: Background color for chart type selector

aggregatorFontSize.description: Font size for aggregator dropdown (in pixels)

tableBorderWidth.description: Width of table cell borders (in pixels)

chartTitle.description: Static text for chart title (overrides auto-generated title)

chartTitleFontSize.description: Font size for chart title (in pixels)

xAxisTitleFontSize.description: Font size for X-axis title (in pixels)

yAxisTitleFontSize.description: Font size for Y-axis title (in pixels)

stylePreset.description: Apply a predefined style preset to the visual

lastAppliedPreset.description: Internal: tracks the last applied preset to prevent re-applying on reload

heatmapColor.description: The color used for heatmap visualization (highest values)

chartBackgroundColor.description: Background color for the chart area

chartPlotBackgroundColor.description: Background color for the plot area

chartAxisTickColor.description: Color for axis labels and tick marks
